headline: How the Navy's retail business is working to pull off a turnaround
summary: Sales have fallen at the Navy Exchange, the government-owned department store chain that provides tax-free products to enlisted servicemembers and veterans. Its stores are an important benefit to military families stationed across the world, and its profits directly improve the welfare of Navy sailors. The company is working to revamp its fleet of stores with a planned investment of around $100 million to better compete with major e-commerce players like Walmart and Amazon.

headline: Is Walmart (WMT) Still Reasonably Priced After A 51% One Year Share Price Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Walmart's share price still reflects fair value after a strong run, it helps to step back and look at what the current market price is actually implying. The stock closed at US$122.49, with returns of 8.6% year to date and 51.1% over the past year, while the 7 day and 30 day returns of a 1.4% decline and a 1.1% decline hint at some recent cooling after a very strong multi year stretch of 153.5% over 3 years and 181.6% over 5 years. Recent headlines have focused...

headline: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Black+Decker® Appliances/
summary: Black+Decker®, a global leader in home innovation, today announced the launch of the VacuSteam™ Handheld Steamer, a category-redefining advancement in garment care. Making its retail debut at Walmart and on Walmart.com, the VacuSteam is the first device of its kind to combine suction, steam, and heat, effectively eliminating the friction of traditional steaming to deliver "One-Pass Perfection."
